name: Ogdoadic Daybreak
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>溟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>闢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>びゃく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Tribute 1 Reptile monster; for every 2 Levels that Tributed monster had on the field, Special Summon up to 1 "Ogdoadic Token" (Reptile/DARK/Level 2/ATK 0/DEF 0). During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 of your banished Reptile monsters; shuffle it into the Deck, then you can send 1 Reptile monster from your Deck to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Ogdoadic Daybreak" once per turn.
eff: Tribute 1 Reptile monster; for every 2 Levels that Tributed monster had on the field, Special Summon up to 1 "Ogdoadic Token" (Reptile/DARK/Level 2/ATK 0/DEF 0). During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 of your banished Reptile monsters; shuffle it into the Deck, then you can send 1 Reptile monster from your Deck to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Ogdoadic Daybreak" once per turn.

action: Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
